name: OpenClaw Context Budget
description: Hard-enforce progressive disclosure by truncating oversized tool results before they are persisted into session transcripts.

cronOnly.label: Apply only to cron sessions
cronOnly.help: When true, only session keys containing ':cron:' are processed.

toolAllowlist.label: Tool allowlist
toolAllowlist.help: Only tool results from these tool names are considered for truncation.

maxChars.label: Max chars
maxChars.help: Maximum characters allowed before truncation kicks in.

maxLines.label: Max lines
maxLines.help: Maximum lines allowed before truncation kicks in.

tailLines.label: Tail lines
tailLines.help: How many trailing lines to keep in the persisted snippet.

outDir.label: Archive output directory
outDir.help: Directory used to store full tool outputs before truncation.
